headline: Is Smurfit Westrock (SW) One of the Best Stocks to Buy from Billionaire George Soros’ Stock Portfolio?
summary: Smurfit Westrock Plc (NYSE:SW) is included among the Billionaire George Soros Stock Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. On May 21, Barclays analyst Pallav Mittal lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Smurfit Westrock Plc (NYSE:SW) to $52 from $54. He reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm updated its models for the European paper […]
